summary: A montage set to music that opens with an aerial drone shot of the Minneapolis skyline and a title card ('MINNEAPOLIS, MN'), then shows HSI/ICE 'POLICE' agents entering businesses (civilian faces blurred), and closes on an animated U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal. There is no speech; the audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Aerial drone shot of the Minneapolis downtown skyline under blue sky; white title card overlay 'MINNEAPOLIS, MN' with a red accent bar.
Handheld shot from behind an agent in a navy jacket reading 'POLICE / HSI' as he enters a convenience store.
Agents (civilian faces blurred) move through a shop doorway with a 'CLOSED' sign; snowy parking lot outside.
Interior of a small food/restaurant counter; an agent stands facing a blurred-face person in a plaid shirt.
Animated U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal on a white background as the closing card.

notable_text: ICE is boots on the ground in Minneapolis, MN, investigating suspected fraud sites. American taxpayers deserve answers.
